title: Lifecycle
text:
</details>

<details>
  <summary>November 2025</summary>

**Added/Changed**

- `qwen3` changed to [Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B-Thinking-FP8](https://huggingface.co/Qwen/Qwen3-VL-235B-A22B-Thinking-FP8) — adds state-of-the-art vision and video.
- `kimi` ([moonshotai/Kimi-K2-Thinking](https://huggingface.co/moonshotai/Kimi-K2-Thinking)) — frontier programming model comparable to Claude Sonnet 4.5 / GPT-5.
- `glm-4.6` ([QuantTrio/GLM-4.6-GPTQ-Int4-Int8Mix](https://huggingface.co/QuantTrio/GLM-4.6-GPTQ-Int4-Int8Mix)) — comparable to Claude Sonnet 4 / Gemini 2.5 Pro.
- `minimax-m2` ([MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2](https://huggingface.co/MiniMaxAI/MiniMax-M2)) — comparable to Sonnet 4 / Gemini 2.5 Pro, fits in four A100s.
- `gpt-oss` ([openai/gpt-oss-120b](https://huggingface.co/openai/gpt-oss-120b)) — capable agentic model on a single A100 or two RTX A6000 GPUs. LTS candidate, supersedes deprecated Llama3 models.
- `gemma3` moved to 2× RTX A6000 GPUs. Sliding-window attention allows full context.
- `glm-v` switched to [zai-org/GLM-4.5V-FP8](https://huggingface.co/zai-org/GLM-4.5V-FP8) on 4× L40 GPUs.

**Removed**

- `llama3` ([meta-llama/Llama-3.2-90B-Vision-Instruct](https://huggingface.co/meta-llama/Llama-3.2-90B-Vision-Instruct)) — consumed 4 A100s while being outperformed by single-GPU models.
- `deepseek-r1` — used 8 GPUs but was very slow (5–6 tokens/s) at larger contexts.
- `watt` ([watt-ai/watt-tool-8B](https://huggingface.co/watt-ai/watt-tool-8B)) — removed for inactivity.

</details>
